basic_details.job_title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially announced the Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician ‘C’ Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website under Advt No. 4788/002/REC/HR&A/CHN/2026. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 28 years (as on 01.06.2026) and hold the required qualification of Diploma in Engineering (for EAT) or SSLC + ITI + Apprenticeship (for Technician ‘C’) can now submit their online applications from the official start date (to be checked in the notification) until 08 July 2026. Direct links to download

age_limit.details: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules: OBC (NCL): 3 years, SC: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years. Technician 'C': Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules: OBC (NCL): 3 years, SC: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering for EAT, SSLC+ITI+Apprenticeship for Technician 'C'
qualification.details: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Three years Diploma in Engineering in the relevant discipline/subject from a recognized institution. General/OBC (NCL)/EWS candidates should have secured minimum 60% aggregate marks. SC/PwBD candidates should have secured minimum 50% aggregate marks in the essential qualification exam. Experience: Nil Technician 'C': SSLC+ITI in the relevant trade from a recognized institution and one year apprenticeship training with National Apprenticeship Certificate in the relevant trade or SSLC + 3 years National Apprenticeship Certificate Course in the relevant Trade. General/OBC(NCL)/EWS candidates should have secured minimum 60% aggregate marks. SC/PwBD candidates should have secured minimum 50% aggregate marks in essential qualification exam. Experience: Nil

salary_details.details: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Grade: WG-VII/CP-VI, Pay Scale: Rs. 24,500/- 3% - Rs. 90,000/- + admissible allowances. Technician 'C': Grade: WG-IV/CP-V, Pay Scale: Rs. 21,500/-3% - Rs. 82,000/- + admissible allowances.

selection_process: Provisional Shortlisting based on qualifying criteria Written Test (OMR based) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.bharat_electronics_limited_bel: Diploma in Engineering for EAT, SSLC+ITI+Apprenticeship for Technician 'C'

content_sections.heading: BEL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BEL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BEL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Three years Diploma in Engineering in the relevant discipline/subject from a recognized institution. General/OBC (NCL)/EWS candidates should have secured minimum 60% aggregate marks. SC/PwBD candidates should have secured minimum 50% aggregate marks in the essential qualification exam. Experience: Nil Technician 'C': SSLC+ITI in the relevant trade from a recognized institution and one year apprenticeship training with National Apprenticeship Certificate in the relevant trade or SSLC + 3 years National Apprenticeship Certificate Course in the relevant Trade. General/OBC(NCL)/EWS candidates should have secured minimum 60% aggregate marks. SC/PwBD candidates should have secured minimum 50% aggregate marks in essential qualification exam. Experience: Nil

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules: OBC (NCL): 3 years, SC: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years. Technician 'C': Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules: OBC (NCL): 3 years, SC: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years.

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT): Grade: WG-VII/CP-VI, Pay Scale: Rs. 24,500/- 3% - Rs. 90,000/- + admissible allowances. Technician 'C': Grade: WG-IV/CP-V, Pay Scale: Rs. 21,500/-3% - Rs. 82,000/- + admissible allowances.

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Provisional Shortlisting based on qualifying criteria Written Test (OMR based) Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BEL Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' posts is 08th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' positions in Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) for the Chennai location.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for Engineering Assistant Trainee?
faq.answer: For the Engineering Assistant Trainee post, candidates must possess a 3-year Diploma in Engineering from a recognized institution. Specific aggregate marks are required for different categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to BEL posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 28 years as of 01.06.2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC (NCL), and EWS candidates need to pay Rs. 295/- (including GST). SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BEL jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves provisional shortlisting based on qualifying criteria, followed by a Written Test (OMR based), Document Verification, and a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Technician 'C' post?
faq.answer: The pay scale for the Technician 'C' post is Rs. 21,500/- 3% - Rs. 82,000/- per month, plus admissible allowances. The grade is WG-IV/CP-V.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any work experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: No, as per the eligibility criteria provided, there is no prior work experience required for either the Engineering Assistant Trainee or the Technician 'C' positions.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions the city as Chennai, Tamil Nadu. While the official notification should be checked for specific domicile requirements, generally, candidates from all over India are eligible to apply for BEL positions unless stated otherwise.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
